title: Klara Weinhappl
text:
Hi!
I’m a PhD student at the University of Vienna. My research interests are empirical industrial organization, competition economics, and environmental economics. My advisors are Christine Zulehner and Philipp Schmidt-Dengler.
For more details please check out my CV or feel free to contact me at klara.weinhappl@univie.ac.at!
 
Work in Progress:

Empirical Assessment of Merger Remedies in Europe (joint with Christine Zulehner)
Deforestation Policies and Their Impact on Coffee Consumption
